templates.name: Minimal Left
templates.description: Clean layout with logo on left, content on right. Best for simple, minimal brands.

templates.name: Bold Header
templates.description: Strong color band at top with name and title. Details at bottom. Best for corporate brands.

templates.name: Split
templates.description: Left color block with logo, right white panel with all content. Best for strong color brands.

templates.name: Dark Modern
templates.description: Dark background with light text and accent color highlights. Best for tech and startup brands.

templates.name: Centered
templates.description: All elements centered with logo on top. Great for lifestyle, creative, and personal brands.

templates.name: Gradient Flow
templates.description: Full gradient background flowing from primary to secondary brand color. Best for vibrant, energetic brands.

templates.name: Top Banner
templates.description: Thin accent color bar at very top, content below with clean spacing. Best for consultants and lawyers.

templates.name: Right Accent
templates.description: Thin color accent bar on the right side, content aligned left. Best for design and media agencies.

templates.name: Classic Clean
templates.description: Traditional business card layout with subtle border. Best for banking, legal, and formal industries.

templates.name: Vibrant Block
templates.description: Full solid brand color background with all white content. Best for bold, confident brands.

templates.name: Bottom Bar
templates.description: Clean white card with bold brand color bar anchoring the bottom. Logo top-left, identity top area, contact info middle.

templates.name: Logo Hero
templates.description: Bold color band occupies top half with centered logo as hero. Clean white content zone below. Great for strong visual brands.

templates.name: Name Large
templates.description: Name is the visual hero — large, bold typography dominates. Thick left accent bar. Clean layout for personal brands.

templates.name: Neon Tech
templates.description: Ultra-dark background with neon accent bars and glowing accent text. Designed for tech startups, SaaS, and AI companies.

templates.name: Pastel Soft
templates.description: Warm pastel background with circular logo badge top-left. Gentle, approachable typography. Perfect for wellness, coaching, and personal brands.

templates.name: Executive Gold
templates.description: Dark navy background with gold accent lines and premium typography. Radiates authority. For C-suite executives and premium service firms.

templates.name: Corner Box
templates.description: Bold color box in bottom-left corner houses logo and contact info. Clean white area above for identity. Asymmetric, editorial feel.

templates.name: Two Column
templates.description: Dark card divided by a vertical line into identity (left) and contacts (right). Structured, data-driven layout for tech and SaaS professionals.

templates.name: Magazine Editorial
templates.description: Three-zone layout: color hero band top with centered logo, white info zone middle, dark name band bottom. High-impact editorial style.

templates.name: Minimal Right
templates.description: Right-aligned layout with logo anchored top-right. Text flows right-to-left. Thin left accent bar. Sophisticated mirror of the classic left layout.
